Description: Select which regions to include in the natura raster. Either include all selected countries (counties), the entire cutout (cutout) or the entire globe (global).
Grid resolution of the natura output data in meters.
Size of the shifting rasterization window in bytes. The required RAM scales with window_size^2
Buffer around the regions of interest to include every required value in the unit of area_crs, default: m. A buffer of around 100 km will be sufficient for most cases.
